# Whispered Events

> Whispered Events curates exclusive in-person dinners, conferences, and gatherings for senior operators and executives — the ones that aren't widely posted.

## What we do

Whispered Events is a private platform where senior operators and executives discover high-signal, invitation-only events matched to their role, location, and interests. Members receive curated event digests by email. Events are sourced by the community and vetted by our team.

## Who it's for

Senior operators, executives, and investors — VPs, Directors, C-suite, and Founders — primarily in the US tech ecosystem.

## Anchor event pages

Each major conference has a dedicated page listing all associated side events, dinners, and gatherings. These pages are publicly accessible and indexed.

Example: https://www.whisperedevents.com/dreamforce

## Event types

Conference, Dinner, Happy Hour, Panel, Workshop, Activity

## How to sign up

Visit https://www.whisperedevents.com and submit your profile. Membership is free.

## Contact

hello@whisperedevents.com
